blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 27 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 251 ft. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
